headline: Otarmeni™ (lunsotogene parvec) Receives EMA Filing Acceptance for Genetic Hearing Loss
summary: TARRYTOWN, N.Y., May 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) today announced the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has accepted for review under Accelerated Assessment the Marketing Authorization Application (MAA) for Otarmeni™ (lunsotogene parvec), an in vivo adeno-associated virus vector-based gene therapy for the treatment of biallelic OTOF variant-associated hearing loss. Otarmeni, formerly known as DB-OTO, previously received Orphan Designation from the EMA
